since_last: 92% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.97%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 92% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +1.02% · Gold -0.34% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 92% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.97%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.97%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.90%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +4.02%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.02%, PLTR +3.99%, ORCL +3.74%, CEVA +3.38%, CGNX +3.34%. Laggards: SYNA -1.50%, DELL -0.81%, D -0.42%, DLR -0.22%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.87% at $156.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.87% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
